__fixture__.name: repair_reattach
__fixture__.scenario: A desktop-CLI to remote-agent session drifted out of its scoped capability manifest after a network partition. Both client and agent are still inside the declared adjacent window, but the negotiated capability set and session envelope need to be reestablished before mutation is allowed. Outcome is 'reattach_required' with a typed 'reattach_session' repair hint and a 'refresh_capability_manifest' follow-up. Exercises the repair/reattach flow expected by the acceptance criteria.

dropped_capabilities.reason_note: Scoped capability manifest went stale after the network partition; mutating attach is held until the session is reattached and the capability manifest refreshed.

negotiation.reason: The client and agent remain inside the declared adjacent window, but the session envelope drifted after a network partition. Mutation is held until the session is reattached and the capability manifest refreshed.

skew_window.window_summary: Client and agent stay within the declared adjacent support window and negotiate the capability intersection.

downgrade_behavior.state_preservation_note: Review-only and file-only attach remain available during reattach; mutating attach is held until the session envelope is refreshed.
downgrade_behavior.note: Reattach is a supported recovery path within the declared adjacent window.

fail_closed_state.visible_reason: The remote session drifted out of its scoped capability manifest after a network partition. Attach is available in review-only mode; mutating attach is held until you reattach and refresh the capability manifest.

unsupported_state_behavior.contract_rule: Refuse mutating attach and degrade to review-only or file-only mode with a visible reattach hint; never silently continue a drifted session.

repair_hints.instruction: Reattach the session to rebuild the scoped capability manifest and restore mutating attach.
Refresh the scoped capability manifest from the remote agent so the client and agent agree on the current session envelope.
Continue in file-or-review-only mode until the reattach completes; no data is lost in this mode.

notes: Illustrative seed envelope only; this is not a live release packet.
